author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

First Capital Freighter - Coming Tomorrow

A new era of freighting is coming.
Tomorrow marks the release of the Fimbul Sledbarge, the first Capital freighter ship!  
Rumor has it that this ship has best-in-class cargo storage and the current best-in-class max warp distance.
